questions: You don't get worked up when things go wrong. You arrive at a coffee shop and they're out of your usual order.
You don't get worked up when things go wrong. A coworker forgets to reply to an email you sent last week.
You don't get worked up when things go wrong. You find a small scratch on your car when you come out of the grocery store.
You don't get worked up when things go wrong. Your internet goes out while you're streaming a show in the evening.
You don't get worked up when things go wrong. Someone takes the parking spot you were pulling into at work.
You don't get worked up when things go wrong. You open the fridge and find someone ate your leftovers.
You don't get worked up when things go wrong. A friend cancels plans an hour before you were supposed to meet.
You don't get worked up when things go wrong. You're in line at the post office and someone keeps talking loudly on their phone.
You don't get worked up when things go wrong. Your order at a restaurant comes out wrong.
You don't get worked up when things go wrong. A package you ordered arrives and it's the wrong item.
